nasb.text: The plans of the diligent lead surely to advantage, But everyone who is hasty comes surely to poverty.

esv.text: The plans of the diligent lead surely to abundance, but everyone who is hasty comes only to poverty.

cnv.text: 殷勤人的籌劃必使他獲利； 行事急躁的必致貧窮。

ccb.text: 勤劳者的计划必致富足， 行事急躁的人必致贫困。

csbs.text: 殷勤筹划的，必致丰富； 行事急躁的，都必缺乏。
